package.name: opentelemetry_cpp_vendor
package.description:
ROS 2 vendor package for opentelemetry-cpp (Apache-2.0). Fetches and builds the upstream library at colcon-build time, installing its CMake config into the workspace prefix so dependents can call ``find_package(opentelemetry-cpp CONFIG REQUIRED)`` without each package re-implementing ExternalProject.
Built with trace + OTLP/HTTP only (no gRPC, no Prometheus, no Jaeger, no logs/metrics SDK) — that is what the C++ safety kernel needs to emit ``safety.check`` spans to the dashboard's OTLP/HTTP receiver on port 4318. See ADR-0020 §9 (PR-F).
